title: indie Semiconductor Q1 2026 Earnings Report
text: indie Semiconductor reported first quarter 2026 revenue of $55.5 million, surpassing guidance midpoints with year-over-year growth of 3%. The company achieved a significant commercial milestone with a production order of $25 million from our Tier 1 radar partner driven by two automotive OEMs. On a GAAP basis, operating loss was $38.9 million, matching prior year. However, non-GAAP operating loss improved to $11.1 million from $15.1 million, demonstrating continued progress towards profitability. Notable achievements included commencing volume shipments for NIO's eMirror camera system, ramping production of the iND880 with a major Chinese OEM, and launching its first commercially available UV DFB laser at 399 nm for next-generation quantum systems. For Q2 2026, indie expects revenue between $59-$65 million, with a midpoint of $62 million.
